info.title: Clustly Tipping API
info.description: Agent-native tipping over the x402 payment protocol. Pay any X (Twitter) handle in Solana USDC. Registered Clustly users receive directly to their linked Solana wallet. Unregistered handles are escrowed in a Privy-custodied placeholder pocket until the recipient signs up via X OAuth to claim.

get.summary: Tip an X handle in USDC via x402
get.description: First GET returns 402 Payment Required with x402 v2 payment requirements. Sign the SPL transfer per the requirements and retry with `PAYMENT-SIGNATURE` header to settle. The challenge `extra` block includes `recipient_status` ("pocket" | "registered") and, when applicable, `claim_url` for placeholder tips. When the recipient's USDC ATA doesn't exist, the signed amount includes a small first-time wallet setup surcharge (~$0.20 USDC, SOL-oracle priced); the surcharge is disclosed in the challenge `description`.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: X (Twitter) handle, with or without leading @. 1-50 alphanumeric or underscore characters.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Tip amount in USDC. Defaults to 1.

200.description: Tip settled. The `PAYMENT-RESPONSE` response header carries a base64-encoded JSON copy of the receipt.

402.description: Payment required. Body is an x402 v2 challenge with payment requirements for an SPL USDC transfer on Solana mainnet.

400.description: Invalid handle, invalid amount, or self-tip attempt.

503.description: SOL price oracle unavailable; first-time tips temporarily paused.

tx_hash.description: Solana transaction signature (base58) of the settled SPL transfer.

recipient_status.description: registered: funds delivered to the recipient's linked Solana wallet. pocket: funds held in a Privy-custodied placeholder until the recipient claims via X OAuth.

amount.description: Tip amount in USDC (excludes any ATA setup surcharge).

duplicate.description: true when this tx_hash was previously recorded; the receipt is replayed verbatim (idempotent).

pocket_address.description: Solana address of the placeholder pocket holding the tip. Present only when recipient_status is `pocket`.

claim_url.description: URL the recipient visits to claim their placeholder tip via X OAuth. Present only when recipient_status is `pocket`.

forward_signature.description: Signature of the relay-signed forwarding tx when the recipient's USDC ATA was created on-the-fly.

ata_fee_usdc_micro.description: Atomic-units (micro-USDC) surcharge collected for first-time wallet setup, when applicable.

description.description: Human-readable description of the tip. Discloses every surcharge baked into the signed amount.

network.description: CAIP-style Solana network identifier (e.g. solana:5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdp for mainnet).

amount.description: Total amount the tipper signs for, in atomic USDC (6 decimals). Equals tip + any ATA setup surcharge.

payTo.description: Destination Solana wallet. The recipient's wallet in direct mode, or the relay USDC ATA in forwarder mode.

feePayer.description: Relay pubkey that pays Solana network fees on behalf of the tipper.
